zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Barley於1390年出生在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞時，他的父親John Barley30歲，母親Joan de la Lee26歲。他於1422年與Lady Catherine De Walden在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1445年2月12日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Barley于1390年出生在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞时，他的父亲John Barley30岁，母亲Joan de la Lee26岁。他于1422年与Lady Catherine De Walden在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1445年2月12日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿爾布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Barley was born in 1390, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Barley, was 30 and his mother, Joan de la Lee, was 26. He married Lady Catherine De Walden in 1422, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 12 February 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Barley est né en 1390, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Barley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Lee, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine De Walden en 1422, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 12 février 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Barley 1390 in Albury, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Barley 30 und seine Mutter Joan de la Lee 26. Er hat 1422 in Albury, Hertfordshire, England Lady Catherine De Walden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Februar 1445 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barley è nato il nel 1390 nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Barley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joan de la Lee, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine De Walden nel 1422, nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 12 febbraio 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Albury, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Barleyが1390年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーで生まれた時，父John Barleyは30歳，母Joan de la Leeは26歳であった。1422年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーでLady Catherine De Waldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1445年2月12日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Barley(이)가 1390년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de la Lee(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 Lady Catherine De Walden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1445년 2월 12일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barley nasceu em 1390, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Lee, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine De Walden em 1422, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Barley родился в 1390 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Barley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Lee, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine De Walden в 1422 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 12 февраля 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Barley nació en 1390, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan de la Lee, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine De Walden en 1422, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
